creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 178663
gstreamer1-plugins-sndio.shar

With this plugin players like Totem, Pragha, etc. will be able to play to an sndio server.

OpenBSD directly modifies their GStreamer port and have the sources for it in their ports tree.  Since GStreamer supports plugins I found it easier to just repackage them and create a new upstream repository and port for it instead.

Synth test log: https://pkg.tobik.me/logs/audio___gstreamer1-plugins-sndio.log
